mapper.select:
SELECT io_id AS ioId, io_type AS ioType, io_reason AS ioReason, io_vendor AS ioVendor, io_lot AS ioLot, io_qty AS ioQty, io_date AS ioDate, io_worker AS ioWorker, io_msg AS ioMsg FROM io
AND io_type = #{ioType}
AND io_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND io_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( UPPER(io_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(io_lot) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(io_vendor) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY io_date DESC
